Interrupt Enable / Divisor Latch High

Absolute Address:
Base Offset:
0x4
Size:
0x4
Source:
uart_rf.rdl

Description

DLAB=0: Interrupt Enable Register (IER). DLAB=1: Divisor Latch High (DLH), upper 8 bits of baud rate divisor. DLL=DLH=0 disables the baud clock.

Contents

Bits Identifier Access Reset Decoded Name
[31:8] reserved rw 0x0 -
[7] ptime rw 0x0 PTIME
[6:4] reserved2 rw 0x0 -
[3] edssi rw 0x0 EDSSI
[2] elsi rw 0x0 ELSI
[1] etbei rw 0x0 ETBEI
[0] erbfi rw 0x0 ERBFI

Field Descriptions

ptime - PTIME

Programmable THRE Interrupt Mode Enable (IER[7]). 0=disabled, 1=enabled.

edssi - EDSSI

Enable Modem Status Interrupt. 0=disabled, 1=enabled.

elsi - ELSI

Enable Receiver Line Status Interrupt (highest priority). 0=disabled, 1=enabled.

etbei - ETBEI

Enable Transmit Holding Register Empty Interrupt. 0=disabled, 1=enabled.

erbfi - ERBFI

Enable Received Data Available Interrupt (and Character Timeout in FIFO mode). 0=disabled, 1=enabled.
